changes.description: Added Google Maps and Satellite base layers — switch from the new layer control in the top-right of the map.
Imperial / Metric unit toggle in Settings.
Window size and maximized state are remembered across launches.
Relocated drive timeline to above the overall drive stats.
Added confirmation checks to Check Drives and Revert Drives buttons to avoid accidental triggers.
Settings restyled — toggle pills, compact Imperial/Metric switch.
Overview drive lines are now smoothed out.
Fixed bug related to Play/Pause button not working.
Arrow no longer spins full circles at certain points or when switching between drive and reverse.
Clicking on the map while viewing a specific drive no longer kicks you back to the overview.
Dismissing the Change Log modal no longer also closes the Settings modal behind it.
Process New Drives no longer fails silently on installed builds.
Processing runs on the app’s bundled Node runtime — no separate Node.js install required.
Drive Timeline view for browsing drives chronologically.
Beta update channel — enroll in Settings to receive pre-release builds.
Processing pipeline split into separate, reusable functions.
Process Tesla dashcam clips into drive-data.json.
View drives on an interactive map with route overlays.
GPS repair for gaps in dashcam logs using OSRM routing.
Drive tagging for organization and filtering.
